ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the primary sponsor of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "season_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the primary sponsor for the season */,
  "season_format" TEXT /* Description of the tournament format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Raider, Defender) */,
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the player's social media profile */,
  "player_contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "player_contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "raids_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of raids attempted by the player */,
  "raids_successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful raids by the player */,
  "raid_points" INTEGER /* Total raid points scored by the player */,
  "tackles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of tackles attempted by the player */,
  "tackles_successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles by the player */,
  "tackle_points" INTEGER /* Total tackle points scored by the player */,
  "super_raid" INTEGER /* Number of super raids by the player */,
  "super_tackle" INTEGER /* Number of super tackles by the player */,
  "high_5_raid" INTEGER /* Number of high 5 raids by the player */,
  "high_5_tackle" INTEGER /* Number of high 5 tackles by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player */,
  "substitutions_in" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was substituted in */,
  "substitutions_out" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was substituted out */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "tv_audience" INTEGER /* Estimated TV audience for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "all_outs_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of all-outs conceded by the team in the game */,
  "all_outs_inflicted" INTEGER /* Number of all-outs inflicted by the team in the game */,
  "raid_points" INTEGER /* Total raid points scored by the team in the game */,
  "successful_raids" INTEGER /* Number of successful raids by the team in the game */,
  "successful_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles by the team in the game */,
  "tackle_points" INTEGER /* Total tackle points scored by the team in the game */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the game */,
  "total_points_conceded" INTEGER /* Total points conceded by the team in the game */,
  "first_half_score_home" INTEGER /* First half score of the home team */,
  "first_half_score_away" INTEGER /* First half score of the away team */,
  "second_half_score_home" INTEGER /* Second half score of the home team */,
  "second_half_score_away" INTEGER /* Second half score of the away team */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded by the team in the game */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team in the game */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team in the game */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team in the game */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported by the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., performance_id, game_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource being accessed */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Detailed action taken during the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
